name: Bran Muffins, Joyce's
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix well shortening and sugar, add egg and beat until combined.
2. Stir in all bran and milk and let set until most of the moisture is absorbed.
3. Sift together flour, salt, and baking powder and stir into the first mixture until just combined.
4. Put batter into muffin pans.
5. Bake in a 400°F oven for 30 minutes.
